name: Relevance optimization on frozen local Parquet snapshot

description: Bootstrap frozen Parquet snapshot + harness + autoresearch.sh. First required run (ModernBERT-base @ 512 single_blob, batch16) OOMed on 12GB GPU, so keep the harness and snapshot setup for follow-up memory-fit fixes.

Baseline ModernBERT-base @ 512 single_blob trained successfully and produced AP 0.8719, but autoresearch.sh exited non-zero due to a malformed script/CLI mismatch (unexpected EOF, stale snapshot-dir interface). Fix benchmark wrapper and rerun baseline.

Required run 1 ModernBERT-base @ 512 single_blob crashed with CUDA OOM at batch_size=16 on the 12 GB RTX 3060 during training. Need a harness-level memory reduction (e.g. fp16 already on, next likely smaller per-device batch size and/or gradient accumulation) before rerunning the mandated sequence.

Baseline required run 1: ModernBERT-base @ 512 with single_blob on frozen local snapshot. Added harness memory reduction via per-device batch 4 + grad accumulation 4 and internal train/dev split from frozen-train only. AP 0.9671, ROC AUC 0.9338, log loss 0.3790, peak VRAM 3.69 GB.
